title: [BUG] OSS | Transitive Dependency - node-tmp0.2.3 is Vulnerable
author: surjadeep
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

Exceljs 4.4.0 is using transitive dependent module node-tmp 0.2.3 which is vulnerable - caught in Performance Testing.


## Possible solution (optional, but very helpful):

Please update node-tmp to latest version (0.2.5) 
https://www.npmjs.com/package/tmp

comments.author: gameroman
comments.body:
Hi, I've forked this into https://github.com/excel-js/exceljs if someone is interested

There is also https://github.com/cjnoname/excelts
